All files look correct. Here's a summary of what changed:

**Centralized in `Directory.Build.props`** — all versions now defined as MSBuild properties in one place:

| Package | Old Version(s) | New Version |
|---|---|---|
| System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 / 9.0.0 / 10.0.1 | **10.0.5** |
| Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 / 12.24.0 | **12.27.0** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 | **10.0.5** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 | **10.0.5** |
| NewtonsoftJson (net8.0) | 8.0.11 | **8.0.25** |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 | **1.15.1** |
| xunit | 2.9.3 | 2.9.3 (unchanged) |
| NewtonsoftJson (net6.0) | 6.0.36 | 6.0.36 (already latest) |

**Key fixes:**
- **Legacy/Legacy.csproj** no longer has a hardcoded `Azure.Storage.Blobs` version — uses `$(BlobsVersion)` like Api
- **All 5 projects** reference `System.Text.Json` via `$(SystemTextJsonVersion)` instead of 3 different hardcoded versions
- **Common.props** uses `$(LoggingVersion)` instead of a hardcoded version
- Logging & Hosting are now aligned at the same release (10.0.5)
